items.text:
Subject: Need to swap the shower head this weekend?

Hi Devin,

Hope your exam week is going OK. I wanted to flag a problem with our bathroom that has been getting worse, and figure out a plan before the weekend.

The shower head in our unit has been leaking pretty badly for almost two weeks now. Last night I came home and there was a small puddle on the floor. I called the building maintenance line on Tuesday and they said someone would come Thursday, but nobody showed up.

I checked Sycamore Hardware on Pine Street and a replacement shower head runs about $22. The store is open Saturday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and they have free installation videos posted online. I think we could probably swap it ourselves in maybe twenty minutes.

If you can split the cost with me, I can grab the part Saturday morning and we can install it that afternoon. Otherwise, I'll keep calling the maintenance office on Monday.

Let me know what works for you.

Thanks,
Priya

format_metadata.subject: Need to swap the shower head this weekend?

questions.stem: According to the email, what has Priya already done about the leak?

options.A: She has already replaced the shower head herself.
options.B: She has called the building maintenance line about it.
options.C: She has filed an official complaint with the building owner.
options.D: She has scheduled a Sycamore Hardware technician to visit.

questions.explanation: Priya writes that she 'called the building maintenance line on Tuesday' about the leak.

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the email about the maintenance office?

options.A: It did not follow through on its promised Thursday visit.
options.B: It does not handle minor plumbing repairs in their building.
options.C: It charges tenants a service fee for each maintenance call.
options.D: It is closed every weekend until Monday afternoon at earliest.

questions.explanation: Priya notes that maintenance said someone would come Thursday but 'nobody showed up,' implying the office did not follow through.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this email?

options.A: To complain about ongoing issues with the shower in their unit.
options.B: To propose a plan for fixing the shower head this weekend.
options.C: To ask for advice on choosing the right hardware store nearby.
options.D: To remind Devin about the upcoming chemistry exam week schedule.

questions.explanation: Priya proposes that she pick up the replacement part Saturday morning and that they install it together that afternoon.

items.text:
GREENLEAF MOBILE — WEEKLY SPECIALS

Park location: South Quad, near Hartwell Hall
Hours: Tuesday through Friday, 11:00 AM to 2:30 PM

MAIN BOWLS
• Spring Veggie Grain Bowl — $9.50
• Black Bean Tacos (3) — $8.00
• Lemon Chicken Wrap — $10.50
• Mushroom Quesadilla — $9.00

SIDES & DRINKS
• Sweet Potato Fries — $3.50
• House Salad — $4.00
• Bottled Lemonade — $2.50
• Iced Tea (free refills) — $2.00

THIS WEEK'S SPECIAL
Pair any main bowl with a drink for $1.50 off the combined price.

PAYMENT
Cards and campus meal plan only — no cash accepted. Student ID discount: $1.00 off all main bowls after 1:30 PM.

questions.stem: According to the menu, what is the price of the Lemon Chicken Wrap?

options.A: It costs eight dollars per order.
options.B: It costs nine dollars per order.
options.C: It costs nine dollars and fifty cents.
options.D: It costs ten dollars and fifty cents.

questions.explanation: The menu lists the Lemon Chicken Wrap at $10.50, or ten dollars and fifty cents.

options.A: When they pay with cash at the truck.
options.B: When they order before 11:00 AM each day.
options.C: When they show their student ID after 1:30 PM.
options.D: When they order more than three items at once.

questions.explanation: The menu specifies a 'Student ID discount: $1.00 off all main bowls after 1:30 PM.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the menu?

options.A: All items must be ordered at least one day in advance.
options.B: The food truck is open seven days every week.
options.C: Students cannot pay with cash at this food truck.
options.D: All sides and drinks are included with every main bowl.

questions.explanation: The payment section states 'Cards and campus meal plan only — no cash accepted,' implying cash is not an option.
